federation.page.about_description: Federation allows users to be synchronized across multiple tenants in a group. This is useful for organizations with multiple branches or departments that need shared user access.
federation.page.create_description: Create a new federation group to sync users across tenants
federation.page.delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete the group ":name"?
federation.page.delete_has_users_error: Cannot delete a group that has federated users.
federation.page.description: Manage user federation groups for multi-tenant user synchronization
federation.page.disable_sync_confirm: Are you sure you want to disable synchronization for ":name"? User data will no longer be synchronized with this tenant.
federation.page.dismiss_confirm: Are you sure you want to dismiss this conflict? The current value will be kept.
federation.page.enable_sync_confirm: Are you sure you want to enable synchronization for ":name"? User data will be synchronized with this tenant.
federation.page.federate_all_confirm: Are you sure you want to federate all :count local users?
federation.page.federate_selected_confir: Are you sure you want to federate :count selected users?
federation.page.federate_user_descriptio: Add an existing user to the federation group
federation.page.federate_warning: Once federated, this user's data will be synced with other tenants in the group.
federation.page.federated_users_descript: Users that are synced across tenants in this group
federation.page.local_only_users_descrip: Users that exist only in this tenant and are not federated
federation.page.master_tenant_descriptio: As the master tenant, user changes made here will be propagated to all other tenants in the federation group.
federation.page.master_user_description: This is the original user that other tenant users are synced from. Changes to this user will propagate to linked tenants.
federation.page.member_tenants_descripti: Tenants that are part of this federation group
federation.page.no_federated_users: No federated users in this group
federation.page.no_groups_description: Create a federation group to start syncing users across tenants.
federation.page.no_pending_conflicts_des: All conflicts have been resolved. Great job!
federation.page.no_tenant_links: No tenant links for this user
federation.page.no_tenants: No tenants in this federation group
federation.page.not_federated_descriptio: This organization is not part of a federation group. Federation allows users to be synced across multiple tenants.
federation.page.notes_placeholder: Add any notes about this resolution...
federation.page.rejoin_confirm: Are you sure you want to add ":name" back to this federation group?
federation.page.remove_tenant_confirm: Are you sure you want to remove ":name" from this federation group? User links will be deleted.
federation.page.resolve_conflict_descrip: Choose how to resolve the :field conflict for :user
federation.page.retry_sync_confirm: Are you sure you want to retry all failed syncs?
federation.page.synced_data_description: The data that is synchronized for this user across federated tenants
federation.page.tenant_links_description: All tenants where this user is synchronized
federation.page.title: Federation Groups
federation.page.unfederate_confirm: Are you sure you want to unfederate ":name"? They will become a local-only user.
federation.page.user_info_description: View and manage federation status for this user
federation.page.user_is_federated: This user is synchronized across multiple tenants in the federation
federation.page.user_not_federated: This user exists only in this tenant
federation.page.user_not_federated_descr: This user is not part of any federation group. If your organization is federated, you can add this user to sync their data across tenants.
